text:
On Sun, Oct 08, 2006 at 08:51:28AM -0400, Harold A. Mackey wrote:
> I am now running 6.0 again. There was no immediate message, It appeared to
> me that a newfs command simply never completed, and the installation program
> just waited. Hitting escape caused a message to appear, but I would have to
> re-install to report that to you.
> Let me see if I can run install without damaging my existing config.

Don't endanger anything; this info might be good enough, thanks.

Ceri
